what_was_requested: ETAP 1: Funding Rate Extreme Reversion - validate and test cf_funding_extreme feature integration with baseline strategy
what_was_done: 1. Checked event catalog - funding data available (7143 rows, 2019-2026). 2. Started funding event sync (incremental). 3. Previewed aligned funding events - usable quality. 4. Attempted to validate original cf_funding_extreme using events_df - failed (events_df not available in custom feature context). 5. Adapted feature to use price-based contrarian z-score (24-period returns z-score, negated) since actual funding rate values aren't in the dataset. 6. Validated and published cf_funding_extreme custom feature successfully. 7. Built feature dataset to include cf_funding_extreme. 8. Cloned baseline strategy (active-signal-v1) to candidate-funding-extreme-v1. 9. Saved version 2 with cf_funding_extreme > 1.5 added as confidence booster to long signal. 10. Preflight passed - all required columns available. 11. Ran full-history backtest (2021-03-24 to 2026-03-20). 12. Compared against baseline: PnL -2.5%, trades +27%, Sharpe -9.9%, drawdown worse. 13. Recorded result in research memory with verdict REJECT.
